daily_fact: New York City residents are coming together to support local farmers, as a recent theft of $50,000 worth of walnuts near the Bronx highlights the community's appreciation for fresh produce.
topline_md: A rabid coyote attacked multiple people and dogs near NYC, while a fire on Staten Island prompted a significant FDNY response; additionally, NYC's Mayor Mamdani established an LGBTQIA office and faced scrutiny over various community issues, including complaints about a new broker fee ban and safety concerns in schools.

risks_alerts.title: Risks & Alerts
risks_alerts.summary_md:
### Risks & Alerts

- Rabid coyote attacks 3 people and 6 dogs north of NYC; residents advised to stay alert. [↗](https://news.google.?oc=5)
- Fire at a 3-story building on Staten Island prompts a large FDNY response; avoid the area. [↗](https://news.google.?oc=5)
